message:
feat(workflows): rate_limit.detected event handling across all agent handlers

Extend the workflow engine to handle rate_limit.detected events in
addition to the existing usage.warning and usage.reached event types.
This provides real-time rate limit awareness with cross-pane provider
status tracking.

HandleUsageLimits (Codex):
- Integrate global RATE_LIMIT_TRACKER (LazyLock<Mutex<RateLimitTracker>>)
  for tracking rate limit state across all panes per provider
- Record rate limit events with agent type, rule ID, and retry_after
- Surface provider-level rate limit summary (limited pane count, total
  panes, earliest clear time) in account selection results
- Feed tracker retry_after into exhausted-account fallback plans

HandleClaudeCodeLimits:
- Accept rate_limit.detected event type alongside usage events
- Classify rate_limit.detected as "rate_limit_detected" limit type
- Extract retry_after from trigger extracted data as fallback for
  reset_time
- Build rate-limit-specific recovery plan steps

HandleGeminiQuota:
- Accept rate_limit.detected event type, classify as quota_reached
- Extend trigger_event_types to include rate_limit.detected

Tests:
- 6 new test cases across all three handlers verifying rate_limit.detected
  event handling, classification, and trigger_event_types expansion

Code cleanup:
- rustfmt formatting in engine.rs, coordination.rs, traits.rs,
  plan_helpers.rs (trailing whitespace/blank line removal)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
